title: French Baked Haddock with Norwegian Soup
description: A classic French-inspired dish featuring baked haddock and served with a side of creamy Norwegian soup.
instructions: Line a baking sheet with parchment paper or aluminum foil.
Place the haddock fillets on the prepared baking sheet.
Season the haddock with salt and pepper.
Dot the top of each haddock fillet with buttery breadcrumbs.
Bake for 12-15 minutes or until the fish is cooked through.
Meanwhile, heat the Norwegian soup over medium heat.
Serve the baked haddock with a side of Norwegian soup and Norwegian pastry.
Garnish with chopped fresh herbs, if desired.
